ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #1234567890
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Aapka order #1234567890 confirm ho gaya hai.

Order Summary:
- Item 1: Wireless Mouse (₹799)
- Item 2: USB-C Cable (₹199)

Estimated Delivery: 5-7 business days

Track your order: <URL>

If you have any questions, contact us at <URL>.

We appreciate your business.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your Account – Zoom Meeting Scheduled
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected unusual activity on your account. To keep your account safe, we need you to verify your identity. Please join the Zoom meeting at <URL> within the next 15 minutes.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: secure123

If you do not join the meeting, your account may be suspended. This is an official notice from the IT Security Team.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
IT Security Team
